sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53924" key="katadiwktiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταδῐωκτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n53924.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pursuing</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινος</itype> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2052.tlg001:2:90" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Horap.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.90</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
